title: Weak Continuity of Dynamical Systems for the KdV and mKdV Equations
summary:
In this paper we study weak continuity of the dynamical systems for the KdV
equation in H^{-3/4}(R) and the modified KdV equation in H^{1/4}(R). This topic
should have significant applications in the study of other properties of these
equations such as finite time blow-up and asymptotic stability and instability
of solitary waves. The spaces considered here are borderline Sobolev spaces for
the corresponding equations from the viewpoint of the local well-posedness
theory. We first use a variant of the method of [5] to prove weak continuity
for the mKdV, and next use a similar result for a mKdV system and the
generalized Miura transform to get weak continuity for the KdV equation.
